_comment: Build-time history-scrub ruleset (harness-dev; stripped from public template). Consumed by history-scrub.sh; generated from the history-surface classification. Ops: drop-section|delete-line|genericize.

ops.match:
What was removed (not replaced): the `sdd-marketplace` MCP (defer to Anthropic's
Claude Code Plugin Marketplace + Docker MCP Toolkit), the RL telemetry
infrastructure, and the **dev-loop** pack (native `/workflow`/`/loop`/`/goal`
supersede it). Domain specialists were collapsed into a governance-core
**domain-brief registry** (`get_domain_brief`).
ops.note: Removed-subsystem narrative paragraph; the domain-brief registry is documented elsewhere in present tense. Drop the whole paragraph and its trailing blank line.
Embedded changelog. Drop heading through the line before the next '## What changed in v6.1' heading.

ops.match: ## What changed in v6.1 (Opus 4.8 re-base + agnostic core)
ops.note: Embedded changelog. Drop heading through the trailing '---' before the Framework/Constitution footer; collapse the resulting duplicate '---' separators.
Dated footer stamp. KEEP the adjacent Framework/Constitution/Architecture/Runtime identity lines.
Dated header stamp. KEEP Version/Constitution/Architecture/Total Agents/Plugins identity lines.

ops.match: > **Note**: task-orchestrator, swarm-coordinator, and workflow-coordinator were converted to enhanced skills (`team-orchestration`, `multi-skill-workflow`) with Task Brief sections in v5.0.0. v6.0.0 added `plan-review` and `retro` skills for the LogicLoom workflow. A `cross-check` skill (governed cross-provider adversarial reviewer) was added later (now 10 skills total in this plugin).
ops.replacement: > **Note**: this plugin's orchestration is skill-based — `team-orchestration`, `multi-skill-workflow`, `plan-review`, `retro`, and `cross-check` (10 skills total in this plugin).
ops.note: Strip 'were converted...in v5.0.0' / 'v6.0.0 added' / 'added later' evolution narrative; keep current skill inventory.

ops.match: > All 4 specification agents (specification-agent, planning-agent, tasks-agent, specification-orchestrator) were converted to enhanced skills with Task Brief sections in v5.0.0. Skills: `sdd-specification`, `sdd-planning`, `sdd-tasks`, `unified-specification`. These back the SDD-waterfall workflow pack.
ops.replacement: > Specification work is skill-based: `sdd-specification`, `sdd-planning`, `sdd-tasks`, `unified-specification` back the SDD-waterfall workflow pack.
ops.note: Strip 'were converted...in v5.0.0' provenance; keep current skill inventory.
